programmes.show_description: Waterworld. Dropped into the South China Sea, 12 elite survivalists try to survive 40 days on land and sea. Two all-star survivalists start a 60-day challenge in the Philippines. S4, Ep1
Surviving With Sharks. With resources dwindling, the survivalists risk their lives entering the shark-infested South China Sea in search of a meal they all desperately need. S4, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Timberville House. The team salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. They find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. S10, Ep11
Boulevard At Capital Centre. The guys get a big opportunity in suburban DC on the former site of the Capital Centre. Plus, Tay builds a breakfast table from an old car engine. S10, Ep12
The Gamble. This summer, the fleet bets it all on new tech, new claims, and new opportunities. Plus, Vernon's on the hunt for a new ship to launch his 'golden seahorse'. S5, Ep7
Pressure. With the season in full swing, Shawn brings in family to help reach his goal. The Kellys try to get familiar with their new claims and a familiar newcomer joins the fray. S5, Ep8
The Dirt Dogs invest in a hard rock mining plant. And, the Gold Gypsies are eager to be back in the field, but a $20,000 excavator repair is a tough start to the season. S4, Ep1
All You Can Eat. Julia helps a customer deal with a python in their garden with a particularly big belly. Plus, Julia and John race to get a python out of a tree. S1, Ep10
We're Not In Kansas Anymore. On the Northwestern, the exhausted crew struggles to keep up with Captain Sig's maniacal pace - and deckhand, Jake Anderson, pays the price in blood. S6, Ep8
Glory Days. A distress call is issued when a man on a vessel suffers a heart attack and the coastguard attempts a dramatic rescue in huge seas, with low fuel and low visibility. S6, Ep9
The Trail Of Blood. A vital clue on Snake Island sees the team in the perilous Paraguayan jungle. A historic artefact brings them closer to treasure - and life-threatening encounters. S2, Ep1
The Quest For King Arthur. Josh Gates traverses England, Wales and Scotland, wading through history and legend to search for evidence of a real King Arthur. S2, Ep1
The Real Robin Hood. Josh Gates journeys across England to uncover the true story behind Robin Hood. He explores underground tunnels and finds what may be his final resting place. S2, Ep2
Flood, Sweat, & Tears - Part 2. The Raneys must move an entire cabin into the flood zone as Marty's dam is tested. The surprise arrival of chicks means the coop needs an upgrade. S2, Ep13
Fire & Ice. The Raneys create their first-ever self-automated homestead in the fierce Alaskan wilderness while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty. S2, Ep4
The Blacklighters are forced to move their 10-ton processing plant to a new claim. Plus, the Cheals try to use abandoned truck parts to fix their agitator machine. S5, Ep8
As the Bushmen search for a partner, their new rookie ignores safety protocols and rushes into a deadly no-go zone. Plus, the Cheals attempt to revive their season. S5, Ep9
Proving Grounds. Jake is enraged when his deckhand falls asleep on night watch, putting the entire crew at risk. Plus, a monster wave hits the Time Bandit. S12, Ep10
Raw Deal. While Keith and Johnathan test the boundaries of partner fishing, Captain Jake struggles to stay cool with a problematic deckhand. Later, Wild Bill takes one for the team. S12, Ep11
Rigors Of The Job. As his crew completes government fixes in record time, Todd promises a gold bonus to all miners who finish the season - but one greenhorn struggles. S2, Ep8
Seaborne Sacrifice. Sig deploys a Norwegian secret weapon to locate the bairdi school. Meanwhile, in Dutch, crew drug tests threaten to leave them a man down. S20, Ep8
The Gold Retrievers chase off a late-night intruder. Shane and Russell venture out on a new expedition, while the Poseidon Crew make a big decision. S7, Ep2
Lightning On The Open Seas. Jeff and Laura go fishing but are caught in a big electrical storm on the open water. Plus, the conditions lead to the island claiming its first victim. S4, Ep3
The Devil And The South China Sea. Tropical storms hit, and the torrential rain and lack of food brings a survivalist to breaking point. One team is stalked by territorial sharks. S4, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Return To Cap Centre. The team are back at the Capital Centre. They salvage from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, bringing back shoji screens and bullet-proof plexiglass. S10, Ep13
Jamestown Moose Lodge. The crew accept an invitation to salvage a 100-year-old lodge in Jamestown, New York. They collect unique stair spindles and beautiful stained glass. S11, Ep1
Golden Dreams. While Derek finds out what the best dredge in Alaska can do, Vernon plans to steal a boat from an old enemy. Emily's new diver gets his first time under the water. S5, Ep9
Father's Day. While Shawn looks to give his dad a golden gift for the inland mining operation, Kris gives father Brad a very 'Kelly' present to celebrate the special day. S5, Ep10
The Scrappers launch their season determined to find a huge gold haul. Meanwhile, new crew the Victoria Diggers may have stumbled on a million-dollar motherlode. S4, Ep2
It Comes In The Night. Forrest searches for a bull elephant that has been destroying local villages. The investigation leads to one of his biggest animal rescues. S1, Ep1
The Darkened Sea. The Time Bandit and Cornelia Marie are hauling in huge crab numbers. But Captain Phil's good mood is severely dented when his son reveals a terrible secret. S6, Ep10
Blown Off Course. Crisis hits the Cornelia Marie as the skipper becomes ill. While on the Northwestern, Jake Anderson learns disturbing details about his father's disappearance. S6, Ep11
A Cursed Fortune. The team finds more artefacts leading them closer to treasure, and meets a local historian who gives them a valuable clue, but warns of the fortune's cursed past. S2, Ep2
Captain Kidd's Treasure. Josh travels to the Caribbean to hunt for the legendary treasure of Captain Kidd. The search takes him to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer. S3, Ep10
Blackbeard's Hidden Gold. Josh Gates explores the ocean floor of the Cayman Islands and the coasts of North Carolina to find the lost treasure of the legendary pirate, Blackbeard. S2, Ep4
Shock And Awe. Marty embarks on an ambitious, off-grid hydropower system following a storm. Matt creates a meat smoker, but a surprise accident leads to a construction site injury. S2, Ep5
Killzone. Marty helps Oregon homesteaders build a barn, Misty creates her first-ever subterranean garden, and Matt finds a humane approach to a mysterious predator threat. S2, Ep6
The Bishop hires a bomb expert to blast the impenetrable rock that's blocking access to a rich opal seam. Meanwhile, the Misfits face avalanches and dust storms. S5, Ep10
The Mooka Boys risk being buried alive as they hunt for a legendary mine shaft. The Blacklighters are overwhelmed by choking dust on their bone-dry claim. S5, Ep11
Settling The Score. Winter kicks into high gear on the Bering Sea. While an unruly deckhand forces captain Sean Dwyer to enforce his dad's law, Keith struggles with new greenhorns. S12, Ep12
For a crab fisherman, violent storms, huge waves, and long stretches of hard labour are part of the job. Meet the men who made it through their training - and those that didn't.
Little House On The Line. The crew takes on a modular build to help a dad who needs more space for himself and his daughters. And Ashely has the crew crawling up the walls. S15, Ep4
Bricks And Beams. Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders crew build a beautiful, two-story log cabin addition for an old brick home in Lexington, Virginia. S15, Ep4
A disastrous fire could ruin the Gold Timers' season before it has even begun. The Ferals are forced to launch a rescue mission when Rob goes missing. S7, Ep3
